title: calophyllum alboramulum
intro: Calophyllum alboramulum, also known as the White Rajan tree, is a species of tree native to the tropical forests of Malaysia and Indonesia, belonging to the family Calophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calophyllum alboramulum include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin infections, and alleviate pain, as well as its use in treating respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Calophyllum alboramulum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are often used to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
